signals.raw: Failed Negotiations:** Weekend talks in Islamabad concluded without a deal.[2]

signals.headline: Ongoing Diplomacy:** Despite the blockade, Trump stated that Iran has called seeking to negotiate, saying "we've been ca
signals.raw: Ongoing Diplomacy:** Despite the blockade, Trump stated that Iran has called seeking to negotiate, saying "we've been called by the other side" and "they want to work a deal."[3] Both sides remain open to further discussions, with U.S. officials pushing for Iran to remove nuclear material from the country.[2]

signals.headline: Prediction Market Impact:** The combination of escalating military pressure (port blockade, Strait of Hormuz restriction
signals.raw: Prediction Market Impact:** The combination of escalating military pressure (port blockade, Strait of Hormuz restrictions) alongside simultaneous diplomatic outreach creates significant uncertainty about whether negotiations will succeed before the ceasefire expires. The tight timeline—negotiations needed this week according to reporting—adds market-moving volatility.[2]
